raw.message: 🔒 Lock on. 🎯 Fire. 💥 Destroy the enemy in real PvP matches.

hook.summary: High-octane jet fighter combat featuring evasive maneuvers and missile strikes.
hook.visual_action: A jet maneuvers under a bridge while dodging lasers, followed by a close-up of another jet's afterburner and missile launch.

scene_flow: Jet maneuvers under a bridge while dodging enemy fire.
Close-up shots of jets engaging in dogfights with missiles and flares.
Fast-paced aerial combat sequences through canyons and open sky.
Explosive finishes as jets are shot down in mid-air.
End card with game title, CTA, and platform logos.
audience_proxy: Action-oriented male gamers 18-40 interested in military aviation and competitive dogfighting.
